name: RX-79[G]Ez-8 "Ironstride"
description:
You got late to the battlefield, and the AI isn't happy about you're abstinence, so either makeup by following orders or you end up on her bad side.

Well, lads, the air event starts soon. Gonna get that F5, so I might do another bot sometime during it, maybe War Thunder-related. Anyway, I hope I find anyone doing the event playing 10.7 to 11.3 RB. If not, good luck. If you ain't getting it, no shame about it.
creator: FNIX1
